overview.short: Atishay Kshetra Lunwa is a famous Jain pilgrimage site situated 70 km from Jaipur in Lunwa, a small village in the Nagaur district of Rajasthan, India.
overview.description: Atishay Kshetra Lunwa is a famous Jain pilgrimage site situated 70 km from Jaipur in Lunwa, a small village in the Nagaur district of Rajasthan, India. The temple, one of two Jain temples in Lunwa, was established in 1672.

topPlaces.description: Devli Kalan is a village in Nawa Tehsil in Didwana Kuchaman district of Rajasthan State, India. It belongs to Ajmer Division .

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Atishaya Kshetra Lunwa Jain Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Atishaya Kshetra Lunwa Jain Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Atishaya Kshetra Lunwa Jain Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Jaipur International Airport (66 km) and the nearest railway station is Jaipur Junction (60 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Atishaya Kshetra Lunwa Jain Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Atishaya Kshetra Lunwa Jain Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Atishaya Kshetra Lunwa Jain Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Atishaya Kshetra Lunwa Jain Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Atishaya Kshetra Lunwa Jain Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Devli Kalan.
